symptoms: sql: "select id from t6 order by id", (tests/realtikvtest/sessiontest/session_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select id from t6 order by id", (tests/realtikvtest/sessiontest/session_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select id from t6 order by id", (tests/realtikvtest/sessiontest/session_test.go)
